hooks.name: entire-after-agent
hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; elif [ -f "./entire.exe" ]; then E="./entire.exe"; elif [ -f "./entire" ]; then E="./entire"; else exit 0; fi; exec $E hooks gemini after-agent'

hooks.name: entire-session-start
hooks.command: sh -c 'if command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then E=entire; elif [ -f "./entire.exe" ]; then E="./entire.exe"; elif [ -f "./entire" ]; then E="./entire"; else printf "%s\n" "{\"systemMessage\":\"Entire CLI is enabled but not installed or not on PATH. Installation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods\"}"; exit 0; fi; exec $E hooks gemini session-start'
